summary: Live-applied ADR 0199 by converging Outline on docker-runtime-lv3 with the Keycloak OIDC client, re-publishing `wiki.lv3.org` through nginx-lv3, rotating the repo-managed Outline API token to the final scope set, pruning the default Welcome collection, and verifying the five governed living-knowledge collections end to end.

verification.check: Focused Outline and release-manager regression suite
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_outline_runtime_role.py tests/test_outline_playbook.py tests/test_outline_sync.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_release_manager.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py` passed with 34 tests.
`python3 scripts/validate_service_completeness.py --service outline` returned PASS for ADR, role, catalogs, probes, alerts, dashboard, and runbook coverage.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-portals` both completed successfully after fixing the agent-standards counter parsing in `scripts/validate_repo.sh`.

`uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/interface_contracts.py --check-live-apply service:outline`, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/standby_capacity.py --service outline`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/service_redundancy.py --check-live-apply --service outline` all passed; the service remains approved as `primary_only` / effective `R1` with cold standby on docker-runtime-lv3.

`./scripts/run_with_namespace.sh uvx --from pyyaml python ./scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py run --inventory ./inventory/hosts.yml --playbook ./playbooks/services/outline.yml --env production -- --private-key ./.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` completed successfully with `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=193 changed=6 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=42 changed=2 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=41 changed=0 failed=0`, and `localhost ok=23 changed=1 failed=0`.
`curl -fsS https://wiki.lv3.org/_health` returned `OK`, and the live certificate SAN set includes `DNS:wiki.lv3.org`.

`python3 scripts/sync_docs_to_outline.py verify --base-url https://wiki.lv3.org --api-token-file .local/outline/api-token.txt` passed after a clean sync, and a direct collection listing confirmed only `ADRs`, `Runbooks`, `Incident Postmortems`, `Agent Findings`, and `Architecture` remain, each with one landing page.

notes: This live apply was executed from the worktree on top of source commit `e213cce2d3f362f5689f8710213ec0090551031e` before the receipt and handoff documentation commit was created.

The workstream branch intentionally does not update protected integration files. Merge to `main` still must update the top-level `README.md` summary, bump `VERSION`, update `changelog.md`, and update `versions/stack.yaml` only during the mainline integration / live-apply step.

On this workstream branch, the direct `ansible_scope_runner.py` service playbook path was used instead of `make live-apply-service` because the workstream must not rewrite protected canonical-truth files before merge.
